title: taraxacum carpaticum
intro: Taraxacum carpaticum, also known as the Carpathian dandelion, is a perennial plant species belonging to the dandelion family. Its medicinal properties include its ability to act as a diuretic, reducing fluid retention and relieving symptoms of hypertension and swelling. The health benefits of Taraxacum carpaticum include its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help protect against cell damage and alleviate conditions such as arthritis and digestive issues. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, allowing for various applications in traditional medicine.
